name: King Linen Bed Skirt Gray - Casaluna™
description:
This King Linen Bedskirt from Casaluna™ will instantly give your bed an elegant update. Made from a fabric blend of rayon, linen and cotton, the woven bedskirt adds a chic finishing touch to your bed while concealing the under-bed storage. Featuring a 15-inch drop length, the textured gray bedskirt drapes beautifully and complements any bedding style. Plus, it's machine washable for quick and easy cleaning.

Casaluna™: Where calm and comfort are naturally at home.
